name: Captain Marvel
description: Carol Danvers, aka Captain Marvel, gains superhuman powers after an accident with the Tesseract. Initially serving the Kree Empire, she regains her memories on Earth and joins forces with S.H.I.E.L.D. agents Nick Fury and Phil Coulson. Together, they uncover truths about her past and battle cosmic threats, including Thanos. In 2026, Carol forms "the Marvels" with Kamala Khan and Monica Rambeau to face a new Kree threat. The story concludes with Carol choosing to stay on Earth, supported by her friends. Throughout, she embodies heroism, self-discovery, and cosmic duty.
creator: deadcool
